CREATE TABLE test_dates (date_string String, scale UInt32, timezone String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT toDateTime64OrNull(date_string, scale) AS converted_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT toDateTime64OrNull(date_string, scale, timezone) AS converted_date_with_tz FROM test_dates;
CREATE TABLE test_subquery (id UInt32, date_string String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, toDateTime64OrNull(date_string, 3) AS valid_date FROM test_subquery WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_subquery WHERE id > 1);
SELECT id, toDateTime64OrNull(date_string, 3) AS converted_date FROM (SELECT * FROM test_subquery) AS subq WHERE id = 1;

SELECT (SELECT toDateTime64OrNull(date_string, 3) FROM test_subquery WHERE id = 1) AS first_valid_date, (SELECT toDateTime64OrNull(date_string, 3) FROM test_subquery WHERE id = 2) AS second_valid_date;
